title: AMID EVIL
notes: Main menu runs like native. In game, frame rate drops down to 5-10fps when looking towards the bulk of the map geometry. Changing gfx settings does nothing.
Error: "DX11 feature level 10.0 is required to run the engine."
title: AMID EVIL

notes: Game works almost perfectly - only flaw I see is that player's vision is not properly "fogged" while underwater.  That's not enough for me to bump it down from Platinum
